Career Opportunities
The Centre for Family Literacy is an Equal Opportunity Employer

We strive to be an employer of choice – a place where we provide our staff with the tools and support they need to meet the Centre’s mission to empower people, strengthen communities, and transform lives through literacy.

Current Employment Opportunities

We do not have any open positions at this time.

The Centre acknowledges that we are on Treaty 6 Territory, the traditional lands of many Indigenous peoples and the homeland of the Métis. We embrace the foundations of Indigenous education, which include respect, valued experience and shared learning.
